0.details:
When I met Nago he looked so intimidating, so cool and at ease with himself.
He was in the senior class, but there was something young and approachable about him.
With time, and to my surprise I learned he was my age. Her mother had put him one year ahead because he was a fast and inquisitive kid.
His passion for life was evident everywhere you looked with attention, the way he spoke about food, girls, videogames. not quite like a boy our age. It was all methodically observed.
He was always surrounded by people because of his magnetic personality and eagerness to tell stories, even though he had this thing with the letter r, where he pronounced it funny. I thought it added to his uniqueness and never dared to mock him.
0.model_generation: Today we gather to celebrate the life of Nago, whose presence could fill any room with warmth and laughter. When I first met him, he cut an intimidating figure—cool, self-assured, a senior who carried himself with quiet ease. Yet underneath that poised exterior was a curious boy my own age, expertly advanced by his mother’s belief in his fast, inquisitive mind. His passion for life was evident in every detail: the way he savored food, dissected videogames, and spoke about girls with playful precision. He observed everything methodically, and we were drawn in by his magnetic personality and endless stories. Even his charming mispronunciation of the letter “r” became a beloved reminder of his uniqueness, a quirk we celebrated rather than mocked. Though he is gone, Nago’s laughter, curiosity, and warmth remain with us, guiding us to live as fully and passionately as he did. Rest in peace, dear friend.
0.final_version: When I met Nago he looked so cool, kind of intimidating and with an air of being older, wiser. He was in our senior class at Highschool, but there was something so young and approachable about him, I always felt like he understood me better than the seniors, me being a freshman. I later learned he was my age and he was just a senior because his mom had him start school one year earlier. This dichotomy of cool, fresh, mature and knowledgeable permeated everything he did. How he spoke about music, girls, videogames. It was not the vocabulary or the train of thought of a 16 year old. It was mature and well spoken. He could have convinced anyone of anything. His magnetic personality, easy approach and ease of word made him lots of friends and a bunch of girlfriends. He was both extroverted and a huge introvert for those who could see the signs. I did, his close friends did too. I miss your talks, your introspectiveness and your eagerness to experience and live.

1.details:
Whatever happens, happens.
Problems are closed doors that help us see there are more doors out there.
What you will learn from being down will help you when you are up.
Wether you suffer or not, you will see this through. remember suffering is always optional.
1.model_generation:
Whatever happens, happens; even if we can’t see it yet. Problems are closed doors that reveal the many others waiting for you, guiding you toward paths you never imagined. Each challenge uncovers hidden opportunities and every setback deepens your wisdom for the moments when you’re ready to rise. What you learn from being down becomes your strongest tool when you are up.

No matter how tough things feel today, you have the power to choose your response. You will see this through—suffering is always optional, and you decide whether to let pain define you or empower you. Choose resilience. Choose hope. Remember that your perspective can transform hardship into growth, and a brighter doorway stands ready beyond every challenge. Trust yourself, keep moving, and know that better days are already on their way. Your resilience is stronger than any challenge you face, and the best is yet to come.
1.final_version: When something good, but particularly when something unexpectedly bad happens, remember this too will pass. Nothing lasts forever even if it feels like it will. Imagine you are on an elevator or a plane. you are already on it and it will land somewhere, you cannot stop it, you will still be you on the other side. Use your time to think what you will do when you land, instead of worrying when will it do so. Think that wether you worry or not, you blame yourself or not, the world will still be there when its over, the blame and the suffering is always optional. If you stop to think about something, think about what got you there, the circumstances, the timing, the precision it took for you to arrive where you are. It is not bad luck, it is deliberately there for you to learn something, figure what that something is and you will both power through it in better shape and you will surely have a new tool then you definitely lack now.

2.details:
Been through thin and thick
overcame things big and small
if i need to go to war with only one more soldier i'd choose you everytime.
I want to tend to you
nagged and yelled at by you
share my haves and my have nots.
2.model_generation: My dearest, through every high and low, every mountain and valley, you’ve stood by me. We’ve faced storms and celebrated victories, big and small. In moments dark and days bright, your hand in mine has been my greatest comfort. If I were called to war with only one more soldier, I would choose you each time. I vow to tend to you with patience, to nurture your dreams as you’ve nurtured mine. I promise to cherish your quirks, even when you nag and yell at me as proof of your fierce love, and to laugh with you at every twist and turn. I pledge to share my haves and have-nots, my joys and fears, my every heartbeat. I promise to grow and learn with you through all seasons. I will love you fiercely, support you wholly, and honor you always. Today and all my days, I choose you, my partner, my confidant, my home.
2.final_version: My dearest, through every high and low, every sweet and every bitter. you’ve been here. We’ve faced rain and thunder and celebrated sunny and bright, big and small. In moments dark and days bright, your hand in mine has been my greatest comfort. If I were called to war with only one more soldier, I would choose you each time. I vow to tend to you with patience, to nurture your dreams as you’ve nurtured mine. I promise to cherish your quirks, even when you nag and yell at me as proof of your fierce love, and to laugh with you at every twist and turn. I pledge to share my haves and have-nots, my joys and fears, my every heartbeat. I promise to grow and learn with you through all seasons. I will love you fiercely, support you wholly, and honor you always. Today and all my days, I choose you, my partner, my home, my world.

3.details:
Curated and fortified by time, like good meat and wine.
Ever young and bright, increasingly wise.
Seen your worst, which only enhances your best.
May forever be this happy and full of life.
May you forget all my trespasses with age.
3.model_generation: My love, curated and fortified by time, like good meat and wine, you become ever richer, ever more exquisite. Your spirit remains ever young and bright, your laughter growing more vibrant each passing year. You have seen my worst, yet in doing so, you enhance my best. I promise to honor you, to cherish your wisdom, and to walk with you through all seasons. May our days be forever happy and full of life, our nights filled with shared dreams. I pledge to learn from my faults and for you to forgive my trespasses with age. I am endlessly grateful for your unwavering support and the kindness that fills every corner of our life. Together, we will build a home of warmth, trust, and endless joy. This is my vow: to love you beyond measure, to stand by you in every storm, and to celebrate every dawn with you, now and always.
3.final_version: My love, curated and fortified by time, like good meat and wine, you become ever richer, ever more exquisite. Your spirit remains ever young and bright, your laughter growing more vibrant each passing year. Your sense of humor darker.  May your days be forever happy and full of life. I have seen you at your worst, but that only seems to enhance you at your best. I wish you a full, grand and long life, along with a sharp memory for all the good you make possible and a short and flimsy one for my trespasses.

edits.removed: promise to honor you, to cherish your wisdom, and to walk with you through all seasons.
You have seen my worst, yet in doing so, you enhance my best.
our nights filled with shared dreams.

I pledge to learn from my faults and for you to forgive my trespasses with age. I am endlessly grateful for your unwavering support and the kindness that fills every corner of our life. Together, we will build a home of warmth, trust, and endless joy. This is my vow: to love you beyond measure, to stand by you in every storm, and to celebrate every dawn with you, now and always.

4.details:
Cori. you are the glue of this family.
Your love, care and endless energy does not go unnoticed.
There is no empty heart, I know that, and even if yours looks so light, it is not. you have so much to deal with but your love is so great you make things look easy.
4.model_generation:
Dear Cori,

You are the glue of this family. Your love, care, and endless energy never go unnoticed. In every challenge, you stand strong, lifting us with kindness and warmth. I see your heart is never empty—though it may seem light, it carries so much unseen weight. You juggle so much behind the scenes, yet you make it all appear effortless. Your unwavering support and generous spirit keep our family connected and cared for.

Thank you for every late-night conversation, thoughtful gesture, and smile you share. Your strength and compassion inspire us all, and your presence brings joy into our lives. We are so grateful for everything you do and for the love you give so freely.

Your laughter brightens our darkest days, and your patience reminds what family means. Whenever we need support, you’re always there. Know you’re appreciated and we treasure every moment.

With all my love,
4.final_version:
Dear Cori,

You are the glue of this family. Your love, care, and endless energy never go unnoticed. In every challenge, you stand strong, lifting us with kindness and warmth. I see your heart is never empty—though it may seem light, it carries so much unseen weight. You juggle so much behind the scenes, yet you make it all appear effortless. Your unwavering support and generous spirit keep our family connected and cared for.

Thank you for every thoughtful gesture, and smile you share. Your strength and compassion inspires us all, and your presence brings joy into our lives. We are so grateful for everything you do and for the love you give so freely.

You bring sunshine even in dark days, your strength and your patience reminds what family means. Whenever we need support, even if not voiced, you’re always there. Know you’re appreciated and we treasure every moment you are with us.

With all my love,

edits.removed: r laughter brightens our darkest days

5.details:
Que hay papi lechudo. I just saw a few movies that reminded me of when we were young.
Remember how easy everything was, how nimble we were, how small the world was to us.
whenever I see comedy I remember the endless laughs we shared, the shenanigans, the fun.
I hope you are doing great financially, emotionally.
I wish you all the happiness, joy and sense of belonging you shared with me.
5.model_generation:
Que hay papi lechudo,

I hope this letter finds you well. I just saw a few movies that instantly took me back to when we were young. Remember how easy everything was, how nimble we felt, how small the world was? Whenever I see a comedy now, I think of the endless laughs we shared, the shenanigans and all the fun that filled our days with joy.

I hope you’re thriving—financially and emotionally—and that life is treating you with kindness. I truly wish you all the happiness, joy, and sense of belonging you gave me during those unforgettable times.

Let’s catch up soon and make new memories that will one day feel just as timeless. Write me when you can; I’d love to hear what you’ve been up to. Espero saber de ti pronto. Sending you all my best. Stay safe and keep smiling.

Un abrazo grande,
5.final_version:
Que hay papi lechudo,

I hope this letter finds you well. I just saw a few movies that instantly took me back to when we were young. Remember how easy everything was, how nimble we felt, how small the world was? Whenever I see a comedy now, I think of the endless laughs we shared, the shenanigans and all the fun that filled our days with joy.

I hope you’re thriving—financially and emotionally—and that life is treating you with kindness. I truly wish you all the happiness, joy, and sense of belonging you gave me during those unforgettable times.

I would love to catch up soon and make new memories . Write me when you can; I’d love to hear what you’ve been up to. Que sigan los triunfos. Sending you all my best. Stay safe and keep smiling.

Un abrazo grande,

edits.removed: hat will one day feel just as timeless

post_survey.present_other: That it is essentially me who writes, with my personal quirks and semantic mistakes.
post_survey.feedback: I am sure the emotional aspect was factored in the study due to the nature of the texts involved. I was not prepared for it. I was also not prepared to be at ease with the assistance of an AI for these deeply personal messages. They were both pleasant surprises. Your interface was unobtrusive and clear. The application for AI you are studying is one of my favorites.  I also want to thank you for the opportunity to write things I did not know I needed or wanted to write.  This was one of the best AI studies I have been part of. I hope I can be part of it again. Thank you.
